data.title: GREEN cleanup: update RED test to serve as regression guard
data.description: After removal (7d1b-802b) completes, the RED test from e189-2ad2 now passes GREEN. Review tests/scripts/test-tdd-workflow-removal.sh and confirm it serves as a permanent regression guard against re-introduction of tdd-workflow references. Ensure the test is registered in .test-index mapping to the files most likely to accidentally re-introduce references (CLAUDE.md, check-skill-refs.sh). No behavioral changes expected — this is a verification and cleanup pass.
